message:
test(oracle): add 18 conformance probe tests (s520-s539)

Covers: LEFT JOIN + COALESCE aggregation, multi-column ORDER BY,
nested subquery SELECT, LIMIT/OFFSET edges, empty table aggregates,
string functions, math operations, UPSERT ON CONFLICT, CAST edges,
BETWEEN, DISTINCT, EXISTS/NOT EXISTS, LIKE/GLOB, views, triggers,
FK CASCADE, recursive CTE Fibonacci, complex WHERE combinations.
All 18 pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
